architectural_purpose: deterministic hypothetical transition scenario evidence reasoning without transition execution

classification_semantics.blocked: governance, integrity, or execution-boundary preservation blocks scenario modeling
classification_semantics.incomplete: required scenario identity, session evidence, variants, provenance, continuity, or explainability evidence is missing
classification_semantics.modeled: scenario identity, session evidence, variants, provenance, replay, rollback, and explainability are present with no non-safe markers
classification_semantics.partially_modeled: at least one scenario variant is modeled while visible guarantees remain missing or failed
classification_semantics.prohibited: requested scenario modeling behavior violates non-execution or non-selection boundaries
classification_semantics.unknown: scenario semantics, provenance meaning, continuity meaning, or evidence meaning is uncertain
classification_semantics.unmodeled: scenario cannot be deterministically modeled under current coverage
classification_semantics.unsupported: scenario domain or evidence is outside supported deterministic scope

explicit_limitations: v3.9 Phase 6 transition scenario intelligence is non-executable
v3.9 Phase 6 does not enable orchestration execution
v3.9 Phase 6 does not enable transition execution
v3.9 Phase 6 does not enable graph traversal
v3.9 Phase 6 does not enable routing, scheduling, or dispatch
v3.9 Phase 6 does not enable runtime orchestration engines
v3.9 Phase 6 does not enable runtime mutation
v3.9 Phase 6 does not enable authorization or approval systems
v3.9 Phase 6 does not enable optimization or recommendations
v3.9 Phase 6 does not enable ranking, scoring, or selection
v3.9 Phase 6 does not choose a best scenario
v3.9 Phase 6 does not assign scenario scores
v3.9 Phase 6 does not rank scenarios
v3.9 Phase 6 does not recommend scenarios
v3.9 Phase 6 does not enable production behavior
